title: 2026-07-11｜Daily English

words.meaning: 引导流程；入门流程；新用户接入
words.sentence: The user onboarding flow should explain the key steps without showing too much information at once.
A shorter checkout flow may improve the conversion rate.
The product flow should explain how to handle an exception when approval is delayed.
We should debounce user input before sending search requests.

words.meaning: 过期的；未更新的；陈旧的
words.sentence: The page should refresh stale data after the user returns to the tab.

words.meaning: 水合；前端将服务端 HTML 激活为可交互页面的过程
words.sentence: A hydration mismatch can happen when the server and client render different content.
Please acknowledge the issue first, then share the next action and expected timing.
We reached a compromise by reducing the first release scope.
A refundable fare costs more but gives travelers more flexibility.
The hotel provides an airport shuttle every thirty minutes.

focus: 动态复习：继续强化 dependency / timeout / pagination，并把它们与 stale / debounce / hydration 组合成完整的前端问题描述。
业务表达：复习 eligibility / workflow / milestone，今天重点加入 onboarding / conversion / exception，用来描述用户进入流程、转化和异常分支。
沟通练习：把 follow-up / concern 与 acknowledge / compromise 连用，先确认问题，再说明顾虑并提出折中方案。
旅行复习：继续区分 layover / checked baggage，今天补充 refundable fare / airport shuttle，练习描述转机、行李、退改和接驳安排。
